title: La tavola italiana
grammar_features_introduced: congiuntivo presente in receptive contexts (che i negozi chiudano, penso che)
si impersonale (si mangia, si beve, si ordina, si chiama)
passato prossimo with avere in historical narrative (ha fondato, è diventato, si è accorciata)
complex temporal phrases: dalle 13 alle 16, dopo le 20
subordinated clauses with che, quando, in cui
idiomatic stare a tavola as cultural-linguistic concept
cognate_patterns_showcased: the si impersonale as Italian’s sole option where French has on
notes: B1 level. First lesson with substantial receptive congiuntivo and broad si impersonale usage. Italian share climbs to ~60%+. Cultural content justifies extended Italian exposition where a drier topic would feel forced.
